description: Here is a sneak peek preview of our current deck remodel! Full tear out and rebuild is required with this one, as well as enlarging the main section and adding second set of stairs. Final pictures to come soon! This year is the year to improve and invest in your summer camp/river house! Let us transform your outdoor area into what you need! Call or message today for a free estimate 724-954-8414 PA 176950
